proof: function(x0: Nat -> Complex) { exists(k0: Complex) { complex_converges_to(x0, k0) } = complex_converges(x0) }(z)

function(x0: Nat -> Complex, x1: Complex) { (converges_to(re_seq(x0), x1.re) and converges_to(im_seq(x0), x1.im)) = complex_converges_to(x0, x1) }(z, w)
function(x0: Nat -> Complex, x1: Complex) { (converges_to(re_seq(x0), x1.re) and converges_to(im_seq(x0), x1.im)) = complex_converges_to(x0, x1) }(z, w)

goal: complex_converges_to(z, a) = (converges_to(re_seq(z), a.re) and converges_to(im_seq(z), a.im))
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Complex, x1: Complex) { (converges_to(re_seq(x0), x1.re) and converges_to(im_seq(x0), x1.im)) = complex_converges_to(x0, x1) }(z, a)

goal: complex_converges_to(z, b) = (converges_to(re_seq(z), b.re) and converges_to(im_seq(z), b.im))
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Complex, x1: Complex) { (converges_to(re_seq(x0), x1.re) and converges_to(im_seq(x0), x1.im)) = complex_converges_to(x0, x1) }(z, b)

not converges_to(im_seq(z), a.im)
b.re != a.re
b.im != a.im or b.re != a.re
b.re != a.re
not complex_converges_to(z, b) or not complex_converges_to(z, a)
complex_converges_to(z, b)
complex_converges_to(z, a)
not complex_converges_to(z, a)
